requirement_topic.en: EnerGuide label — Canadian household appliance energy label
requirement_topic.zh: EnerGuide标签——加拿大家用电器能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: EnerGuide標籤——加拿大家用電器能效標籤

summary.en: Covered household refrigerators must carry the Canadian EnerGuide energy-efficiency label when required by the Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016. The mandatory obligation is the federal regulation, including household-appliance labelling provisions and Schedule 1 label elements. The label communicates the model's energy use and comparison information in the Canadian format before retail sale.
summary.zh: 受管家用电冰箱在《2016年能效法规》要求时须加贴加拿大EnerGuide能效标签。强制义务来自联邦法规，包括家用电器标签条款及附表1的标签要素。该标签在零售销售前以加拿大格式传达型号能耗和对比信息。
summary.zht: 受管家用電冰箱在《2016年能效法規》要求時須加貼加拿大EnerGuide能效標籤。強制義務來自聯邦法規，包括家用電器標籤條款及附表1的標籤要素。該標籤在零售銷售前以加拿大格式傳達型號能耗和對比資訊。

standards_or_laws: Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 (SOR/2016-311) — household appliance labelling provisions
Schedule 1 — Explanation for Elements on Household Appliance Energy Efficiency Label / Explication du contenu de l'etiquette indiquant l'efficacite energetique des appareils domestiques
NRCan EnerGuide product energy ratings program

summary.en: China uses the China Energy Label for household refrigerators, typically showing energy efficiency grade, annual energy consumption, volume, and standard reference under Chinese rules. The Canadian EnerGuide label is a different government label with different layout, terminology, comparison scale, and bilingual expectations.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱使用中国能效标识，通常按中国规则显示能效等级、年耗电量、容积及标准依据。加拿大EnerGuide标签是不同的政府标签，版式、术语、比较尺度和双语要求均不同。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱使用中國能效標識，通常按中國規則顯示能效等級、年耗電量、容積及標準依據。加拿大EnerGuide標籤是不同的政府標籤，版式、術語、比較尺度和雙語要求均不同。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label implementation rules for household refrigerators
GB 12021.2 — energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators

gap.en: China Energy Label artwork cannot be reused for Canadian retail sale. The model needs Canadian energy data, Canadian label generation, correct EnerGuide design elements, and English/French label wording where required by the Canadian label format.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识版面不能用于加拿大零售销售。该型号需要加拿大能效数据、加拿大标签生成、正确的EnerGuide设计要素，以及加拿大标签格式要求下的英法文字。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識版面不能用於加拿大零售銷售。該型號需要加拿大能效數據、加拿大標籤生成、正確的EnerGuide設計要素，以及加拿大標籤格式要求下的英法文字。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the Energy Efficiency Regulations, 2016 require a household appliance energy-efficiency label; EnerGuide is the Canadian label program format
mandatory_status.cn: China Energy Label is mandatory for covered household refrigerators in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Prepare a separate Canadian EnerGuide label package. A Chinese energy label or GB energy grade is not a Canadian household appliance energy-efficiency label.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】应单独准备加拿大EnerGuide标签包。中国能效标识或GB能效等级不是加拿大家用电器能效标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】應單獨準備加拿大EnerGuide標籤包。中國能效標識或GB能效等級不是加拿大家用電器能效標籤。
